brief_summary: Coral line chart plotting the Keychron brand tracker score across ten weeks (W19-W28 2026), rising from 30 to 80. All ten points are the brand's actual weekly tracker row scores, not interpolated. The W28 terminal point is a filled coral circle; W26 and W27 are marked as the same-window Orca Echo crowdfunding record and V6 Ultra HE Kickstarter date lock the article's tracker-read section describes.
data_sources: apps/web/src/content/articles/keychron-nova-socket-hybrid.mdx:The tracker read — 'The 2026-W28 tracker row puts the Keychron brand score at 80, up from 30 in W19'

data/trends/2026-W26.json:rows[Keychron].score — 72, note — 'Orca Echo crowdfunding raised 170M yen with 6,501 backers in half a day from June 19. V6 Ultra HE VIP reservation also opened June 15 with Nova Socket hybrid tech.'
data/trends/2026-W27.json:rows[Keychron].score — 77, note — 'Orca Echo crowdfunding topped a new GIZMART platform GMV record five days in; the campaign stays open through August 31.'

data/trends/2026-W28.json:rows[Keychron].score — 80, note — 'Orca Echo crowdfunding hit a GIZMART-record pace in its first five days and stays open through Aug 31; V6 Ultra HE hybrid board locks a July 22 Kickstarter date.'
